catalog_content:
Item Name: IMPRESA [60 Pack] Shot Helper Pain Blocker Device - Champion Distractor Shot Relief for Kids - For Professional & Home Use - Reusable Hurt Blocker Shot Buddy - Numbing Cream for Shots Alternative
Bullet Point 1: Pain Relief Simplified: This FSA/HSA eligible shot blocker is designed for effective pain management during injections. Press the disc firmly over the skin and administer the shot through the opening. Featuring 80 blunt contact points, it minimizes discomfort, helping to achieve nearly pain-free shots
Bullet Point 2: Efficient Injection Solution: Unlike numbing cream, which involves waiting, this shot blocker for injections offers an immediate solution. As a self injection device, it accelerates the process and reduces needle fright, offering a less intimidating experience
Bullet Point 3: Comfort For Children: During immunization, soothe your kids with this shot pain reducer. A vital part of your kids' essentials kit, it distracts young patients from the sting of the shot entry, potentially making them unaware of the injection
Bullet Point 4: Versatile Medical Tool: Whether administering insulin or antibiotics, these shot blockers provide instant relief, making injections less daunting. They are a valuable companion for medical professionals seeking to enhance patient comfort
Bullet Point 5: Practical And Reusable: Each value pack contains 60 plastic discs in a calming light blue. These shot blocks can be washed with mild detergent and water, offering a reusable distraction device for both mental and physical needs. Store at room temperature for convenience
Product Description: The IMPRESA Shot Helper Pain Blocker Device offers a practical solution for those seeking to minimize discomfort during injections. This product, which includes 60 reusable discs, is designed to effectively reduce pain at the injection site, making it an essential tool for both professional and home use. With 80 blunt contact points on each disc, the device impacts sensory signals, providing relief from the sting of injections. This feature is particularly beneficial for children, helping to alleviate needle fear and making immunization less intimidating. Aimed at a wide range of users, from healthcare professionals to parents administering shots at home, this pain blocker is suitable for various injections, including insulin, antibiotics, and other medications. It serves as an alternative to numbing creams, which require waiting periods, by providing immediate distraction. The device's application is straightforward: press the disc firmly against the skin prior to injection, allowing for a more tolerable experience. Designed with durability in mind, these shot blockers are reusable, offering a cost-effective option for those who require frequent injections. Cleaning is simple; wash the discs with mild detergent and water, ensuring they are ready for the next use. The discs come in a soothing light blue color, making them a comforting addition to any medical kit. Storing the shot helpers is hassle-free, as they require no special conditions and can be kept at room temperature. They are ideal for use in medical offices or at home, fitting seamlessly into daily routines. Whether for children facing their first shots or adults managing ongoing medical needs, the IMPRESA Shot Helper Pain Blocker Device is a reliable tool for reducing injection-related discomfort.
Value: 60.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Medical device designed to reduce injection pain, positioned as a practical and reusable alternative to numbing creams. Targeted at both professional and home use, with a focus on child-friendly applications. Standard packaging and bulk quantity suggest a mid-range pricing strategy aimed at cost-effective, repeated use.
